## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the user or contributor problem and the smallest useful solution. -->

## How was it validated?

<!-- List exact automated and manual checks. Keep local, hosted, and paid-provider proof separate. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused on the core evaluation workflow or a clearly supporting capability.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior, or the description explains why no test is needed.
- [ ] User-visible, API, metric, security, or operating behavior is documented.
- [ ] Visible UI changes include desktop and mobile evidence and use progressive disclosure.
- [ ] Metric meaning changes use a new version and preserve historical snapshots.
- [ ] No secret, private evaluation data, machine-specific path, handoff, or temporary file is included.
- [ ] Paid-provider, hosted, and identity-provider validation is claimed only when actually performed.
